name: Foundation
description: Auth, data model, chat interface, background jobs, settings
checkpoint_question: Can Martin log in, see the chat interface, and have a conversation with the AI? Does the workspace feel right?

name: Memory
description: Email/calendar sync, activity timeline, RAG pipeline, NL queries with citations
checkpoint_question: Does it remember conversations? Can Martin ask 'what did X say about pricing?' and get an accurate answer with citations?

name: Prospecting
description: Enrichment, TAM builder, scoring, signals, semantic search
checkpoint_question: Does it build a TAM automatically? Are the scores and explanations useful? Can Martin search 'AI companies in France' and get results?

name: Outreach
description: Sequences, AI email writer, autopilot, sending infrastructure
checkpoint_question: Can it write and send a personalized cold email that Martin would actually approve? Does the sequence engine work reliably?

name: Pipeline
description: Deal management, signal-based stages, risk detection, summaries, analytics

name: Intelligence
description: CRO Copilot, meeting analysis, prioritized actions, proactive insights
checkpoint_question: Does the coaching feel specific and useful? Would Martin actually change behavior based on it?

name: Polish & Gaps
description: Pipeline analytics, proactive insights, deliverability monitoring, drag-drop kanban
checkpoint_question: Is every feature production-ready? Analytics meaningful? Insights actionable?

name: Competitive Gaps — Dashboard + Trust + Actions
description: Daily dashboard, per-signal reasoning, sequence approve/reject, email composer, stall nudges, score viz, pipeline totals, scoped chat, transparency indicators, suggested prompts
checkpoint_question: Does the dashboard make Martin immediately know what to do? Do signals feel trustworthy with citations? Can Martin send an email directly from the AI draft?

name: Competitive Gaps — Contacts + Follow-ups + Extraction
description: Contact auto-suggestion, auto follow-up emails, deal timeline, structured data extraction, multi-language chat, suggested replies

name: Competitive Gaps — Lifecycle + Momentum + Custom Signals
description: Account lifecycle stages, momentum indicators, custom boolean signal columns, chat history persistence

name: Competitive Gaps — Settings + Polish + Microsoft
description: Mail pre-connection config, custom fields, company logos, persistent chat, score viz upgrade, weekly summary, signal columns, Microsoft OAuth, stage descriptions, slide-over panels, domain exclusion

name: Meeting Intelligence + Notifications
description: Meeting recording with AI notes, notification 3-channel system
checkpoint_question: Does meeting recording work end-to-end? Are notifications configurable and reliable across all three channels?

name: Schema-less Architecture + Memory Quality
description: Custom field definitions, dynamic entity rendering, AI field auto-fill, memory recall testing, account summaries, auto-create accounts from email, agent action tools, calendar sync, transcript processing, configurable opportunity stages
checkpoint_question: Does the schema-less architecture work? Can Martin create custom fields and have AI fill them? Is recall accuracy above 90%?
